headline: Veeva Acquires Copli & Launches Falcon MLR for Faster Content Reviews
summary: VEEV expands its AI push with Copli acquisition and Falcon MLR launch, aiming to speed life sciences content reviews and boost Commercial Cloud.

raw.headline: Veeva Acquires Copli & Launches Falcon MLR for Faster Content Reviews
raw.summary: VEEV expands its AI push with Copli acquisition and Falcon MLR launch, aiming to speed life sciences content reviews and boost Commercial Cloud.

headline: RDNT's Unit DeepHealth Expands AI Breast Suite With FDA-Cleared Tools
summary: RadNet's DeepHealth gains FDA clearances for AI breast imaging tools that assess cardiovascular risk and compare prior mammograms.

raw.headline: RDNT's Unit DeepHealth Expands AI Breast Suite With FDA-Cleared Tools
raw.summary: RadNet's DeepHealth gains FDA clearances for AI breast imaging tools that assess cardiovascular risk and compare prior mammograms.
